title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hubtown - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hubtown - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!
